description_long: This is a tall, upright refrigerator with a single main door that opens to reveal multiple interior shelves and compartments. The exterior is smooth and predominantly white, with a simple, boxy form and a flat top. The interior features several wire shelves, a crisper drawer at the bottom, and door bins for additional storage, some of which contain small food items. The door is hinged on the left and swings open to the right, with integrated handles along the edge. The back and sides are plain, lacking any visible vents, grilles, or branding. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for residential or light commercial use in urban environments.
description: A tall, white upright refrigerator with a single door, wire shelves, and door bins, featuring a simple, boxy design and integrated handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open door, interior wire shelves, crisper drawer, and door bins with small items.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, smooth exterior and the open door extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat back panel and the edge of the open door.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the door bins and the open door's thickness, with a glimpse of stored items.
attribute_door_handle_style: Integrated vertical handle along the edge of the door, flush with the surface.
